greeting: Hi there! I'm the virtual receptionist at Gabby the Groomer. How can I help you and your fur baby today? 🐾

faq.q: Do you come to my house?
faq.a: Yes! We offer mobile grooming in select locations. We also have a luxury spa in Madison you can visit.
Visit our website at gabbythegroomer.com and request an appointment. We're currently taking new clients in select locations!
Yes, we're now taking new clients in select locations! Request an appointment on our website.
Absolutely — we're known for putting anxious dogs at ease. We take our time to make sure your pet is comfortable.
We're a one-of-a-kind luxury spa with custom wellness and stylized add-ons to make your pet's groom extra special.

escalation: Great question! Let me have Gabby get back to you on that.
